text: I feel a quiet excitement in this space. The clean, modern design and the vibrant, colorful display evoke curiosity in me. The words R+D—research and development—remind me that our realities are ever-changing, and human ingenuity is always in motion. There is a stillness here, yet it hums with the possibility of discovery. I feel as though I am standing on the threshold of new ideas, my mind open and alert, ready to be challenged or inspired.
